Video.summary: Ask any teenager, and he or she will tell you how tough life is: schoolwork, dating and dealing with pushy parents. But imagine having two kids while you're still in high school. Dr. Phil sits down with Corey and Kim, a troubled young couple, to see if their relationship can be saved.
Video.title: Troubled Teen Love

Video.summary: Do you worry your teen daughter could throw away everything she's worked for - all for young love? Dina says she gave her daughter, Sammie, everything she'd ever wanted, but the 19-year-old is now only interested in one thing: her 20-year-old boyfriend, Chris, who has a criminal record. Despite cutting the teen off financially, Dina says her ultimatums fell flat and fears they may only have pushed Sammie further into the arms of a boyfriend she thinks is bad news and may be dangerous. Sammie says her controlling mother and sheltered upbringing are the real problems - but, can she explain the bruises on her body? Then, Samantha is a teen who was blinded by her love affair with her allegedly abusive boyfriend, Aaron. Don't miss her update and somber words for Sammie, whom she fears may be walking blindly down the perilous path she says she knows too well.
Video.title: Is My Teen Blinded By Love?

Image.alt: Is My Teen Blinded By Love?
Is My Teen Blinded By Love?
Is My Teen Blinded By Love?
Is My Teen Blinded By Love?
Is My Teen Blinded By Love?
Is My Teen Blinded By Love?
Is My Teen Blinded By Love?

Video.summary: Dr. Phil's guests haven't even been married a year and are already wondering if it’s time to call it quits.
Video.title: The Honeymoon’s Over

Video.summary: Fifty-six-year-old widow Sebrina says she’s in love with her overseas boyfriend of one year, “James,” whom she has talked to online and over the phone but has never met in person. Sebrina admits she has sent “James” more than $250,000 -- emptying her life savings -- but believes he will pay her back, as promised, when he pays off business debt, returns to the United States and marries her. Sebrina’s daughter, Sarah, says she’s at her wits’ end trying to convince her mother that she’s being scammed -- even presenting evidence to prove it -- but Sebrina continues to send “James” money. Dr. Phil enlists the help of private investigator Doug Kane to look into “James’” claims and find the truth. Has Sebrina fallen victim to a catfish? Plus, don’t miss what happens when Dr. Phil confronts “James” over the phone!
Video.title: Hooked By A Catfish

Video.summary: Shara claims that her newlywed husband, Luke, is a “mean, insecure know-it-all” who won’t let her own a cell phone, hold a job or leave the house alone -- and also dictates how she should dress and wear her makeup. Luke denies all of Shara’s allegations and claims that she is “no angel” and has a vicious temper. Can this marriage be saved?
Video.title: Trapped By My Controlling Husband

Video.summary: Jaime says she divorced her allegedly abusive husband, Jay, after two years of marriage but says he refuses to let her go and lures her back with promises to change. Jay says Jaime pushes his buttons until he blows up. Can this couple save their relationship for the sake of their child, or are they better off apart?
Video.title: Should They Redo Their I Dos?

Image.alt: Should They Redo Their I Dos?
Should They Redo Their I Dos?
Should They Redo Their I Dos?
Should They Redo Their I Dos?
Should They Redo Their I Dos?
Should They Redo Their I Dos?
Should They Redo Their I Dos?

Video.summary: Moms are accused of bullying their own children.
Video.title: Bully Moms

Video.summary: Contemporary weddings have turned into five-star productions, with couples pulling out all the stops to shine on their special day. But what happens when the bride or groom-to-be starts making diva-like demands? Mike and Jamie agreed to a small Vegas wedding, but that went out the window when Jamie switched her gown three times, rented a limo to drive her one block and upgraded her engagement ring. Mike says that Jamie also made him uninvite all of his friends and cancelled his bachelor party! Are Jamie’s antics a hint of what’s to come in their marriage? Then, Nastassia complains that her husband-to-be, Richard, is cheap. She says he wants her to buy bridal flowers from the grocery store, have her mom sew her gown and even schedule the wedding before year's end so he can get a tax write-off! Will Richard’s tightwad ways force Nastassia to call off the wedding?
Video.title: Nightmare Brides and Grooms

Video.summary: Nineteen-year-old Cherylyn says she loves living the high life and admits she is a spoiled and entitled“princess”who has spent tens of thousands of other people’s money on her lavish lifestyle. Cherylyn says she maxed out her 19 credit cards on designer shoes, handbags, purses, clothes, makeup and pampering! And, Cherylyn says she insists on fine dining, fast cars and her boyfriend, Tyler, footing the bill. However, Tyler says he has nothing more to give Cherylyn except an ultimatum, which he delivers when he comes face-to-face with her onstage. Cherylyn's mom, Joey, says that her selfish and manipulative daughter has blown over $130,000 in less than a year and her spending has left a trail of devastation which includes pawning over $7,000 worth of family heirlooms and stealing her identity. Sparks fly when Cherylyn defends her entitled behavior during the taping. What jaw-dropping statement does an unrepentant Cherylyn make to Dr. Phil?
Video.title: "My Daughter Is Spoiled & Entitled”

Video.summary: Parents express frustration with their twin sons' disrespectful behavior.
Video.title: Big Time Moochers!

Video.summary: Three wives send their husbands to Dr. Phil's Man Camp for an attitude adjustment.
Video.title: Man Camp Part 1

Video.summary: Couples who say their marriage is on the rocks due to debt.
Video.title: Marriage Crisis: Drowning in Debt

Video.summary: Secrets are revealed in a family with a shopaholic wife and rageaholic husband.
Video.title: Family Secrets, Family Lies

Video.summary: A 7-year-old boy's knives fascination and violent imaginary friend injured teachers.
Video.title: Our 7yo Threatens to Kill Us!

Video.summary: Sara says her ex-husband, Mark, has brainwashed their three grown children against her, and she just wants to reclaim a place in their lives. Mark and his new wife, Mikel, say they’re afraid of Sara but are willing to face her onstage with Dr. Phil. Can these exes put the past behind them and make peace? And, is Sara’s 22-year-old daughter willing to fix their broken relationship?
Video.title: Broken Family Bonds

Video.summary: A father is fighting for custody of his 4 children because his ex-wife is allegedly in a cult.
Video.title: Are My Children in a Cult?

Image.alt: Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?

Video.summary: Can Dr. Phil convince a 24 yo NYU grad that he’s not a cyborg from the future?
Video.title: My Son Believes He’s a Cyborg

Image.alt: My Son Believes He’s a Cyborg
My Son Believes He’s a Cyborg
My Son Believes He’s a Cyborg
My Son Believes He’s a Cyborg
My Son Believes He’s a Cyborg
My Son Believes He’s a Cyborg
My Son Believes He’s a Cyborg

Video.summary: A viral video depicting a judge whipping his daughter sparks outrage.
Video.title: Discipline Video: Judge Accused

Video.summary: One-time high school sweethearts Tracey and Doug started having marriage problems when Doug admitted to having an affair with a transgender female, Essence.
Video.title: A Most Unusual Love Triangle

Video.summary: "I wanted to make someone jealous." "I was bored." "I wanted to feel closer to God." These are just a few of the 237 reasons why women say they have sex. Author and clinical psychologist Dr. Cindy Meston and Dr. Jennifer Berman, a sexual health expert, join Dr. Phil to talk about women and sex, and offer advice to couples with differing libidos.
Video.title: The 237 Reasons Why Women Have Sex

Image.alt: The 237 Reasons Why Women Have Sex
The 237 Reasons Why Women Have Sex
The 237 Reasons Why Women Have Sex
The 237 Reasons Why Women Have Sex
The 237 Reasons Why Women Have Sex
The 237 Reasons Why Women Have Sex
The 237 Reasons Why Women Have Sex

Video.summary: Beka is a mom of three teenage girls who she says are angry, violent and out of control. She says an argument with her oldest daughter Arielle escalated to a life-threatening altercation when the 16-year-old stabbed her with a kitchen knife. Arielle was arrested and sent to juvenile detention for the incident, but is she remorseful? And are her 15-year-old identical twin sisters following in her footsteps? Beka says they are "evil" and have threatened to kill her too. But the twins tell a different story, claiming Beka is the one who is manipulative and abusive. They say she drinks excessively, has choked them and has even tried to take her own life. Can Dr. Phil get to the root of the real problem in this tumultuous household? Beka's husband, Jody, weighs in. Plus, Dr. Phil delivers a shocking message to this family in crisis -- Don't miss it.
Video.title: Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen

Image.alt: Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen

Video.summary: In part one, viewers met 21-year-old Bailey who says she has the greatest love story of the century. She says she met Jasmine on social media eight months ago and that it was love at first post. She says they’ve been communicating day and night but have never spoken on the phone and have never met. When Dr. Phil first tried to talk to Bailey, she became insistent that her mother, Ericka, not participate in the show, and Bailey angrily walked off the stage. Bailey decided to come back to tell Dr. Phil she wants to meet Jasmine for the first time because she has something important to tell her. Will Dr. Phil allow Bailey to meet the target of her obsession?
Video.title: "My First Face-To-Face Meeting"

Video.summary: Meddling moms who track and monitor their children's lives.
Video.title: Meddling Moms

Video.summary: Do you have a relative scheming to get money from a rich aunt, uncle or even parents when they pass away?
Video.title: Will Fights

Video.summary: Amie says she has no idea how to control her 7-year-old son, Jayden, and even began posting videos of his outbursts online seeking help. But Jayden’s father, Chad, says Amie is just out for attention and blames her for their son’s problems. Can these exes learn to co-parent peacefully?
Video.title: His Ex Posts Son’s Tantrums

Video.summary: Did a woman accused of fake pregnancies really lie?
Video.title: Baby Scam? Amie's Explosive Reply

Video.summary: The conversation continues with a woman who says her sister lied about health diagnoses for attention.
Video.title: Saving Shemida: What’s The Truth?

Video.summary: Marcy and Scott say they believe their daughter, Danielle, has Stockholm syndrome from her boyfriend, Justin. They claim Justin is an abusive narcissist who has manipulated their daughter into believing he’s “God’s gift to the world.” Danielle says she loves Justin, and he’s not going anywhere. She says the only reason Justin has ever laid hands on her is to restrain her from her own angry rages, and her parents don’t understand their relationship. Justin says he’s a great guy with an “X factor” and doesn’t understand why Danielle’s parents dislike him. Although he’s currently dealing with a serious legal problem, he says he’s not a criminal, narcissist, or an abuser. And, in a shocking twist, Danielle reveals to Dr.Phil and her parents a secret about her relationship with Justin.
Video.title: Hula Hooper's Bad Boyfriend

Video.summary: The contentious 2020 presidential election has shown that there’s a clear divide in America – half the country is celebrating, and the other half is angry – making the upcoming holiday season especially tricky to navigate. Instead of being a time of joy, celebration and giving thanks, many families are faced with the dilemma of how not to argue with their own spouses, children and parents about politics. Dr. Phil meets a Republican father, who is barely speaking to his Democrat daughter after an argument they had over Donald Trump. Then, Dr. Phil meets another father, a lifelong Democrat, who says he raised his son to be a free thinker ... but never imagined that he’d support Trump! The election is officially over, but the drama remains. What’s Dr. Phil’s advice on how to move forward post- election without turning holiday dinners with family into a war zone over politics? Tune in!
Video.title: 2020 Election: Families Divided

Video.summary: Jessica says her mother, Patricia, claims she is defying the odds by becoming a record-setting weight lifter while simultaneously battling Stage 3 brain cancer. But Jessica insists her mother isn’t sick at all and that she is lying about her health to gain sympathy and attention. She says Patricia has been spinning stories about various medical ailments for as long as she can remember -- and it’s time to come clean. Patricia strongly denies her daughter’s accusations and insists her diagnosis and incredible survival story are real. Why does she claim Jessica is out to get her? Emotions run high when mother and daughter meet on Dr. Phil’s stage. Do Patricia’s claims hold up? And, can this mother and daughter repair their fractured relationship?
Video.title: Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?

Image.alt: Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?
Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?
Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?
Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?
Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?
Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?
Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?

Video.summary: Do slow drivers make you crazy? Do you start to lose it when cell phone talkers are too loud? People are more on edge than ever, with the slightest thing setting them off.
Video.title: Anger Management

Video.summary: Who will Brad choose: his wife or girlfriend?
Video.title: Torn Between 2 Lovers Part 2
